caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, textured wig, is speaking into a microphone in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs. To his right, a clothing rack displays apparel with the brand "LEE" visible on a tag. Two logos are present on the screen: one on the left says "PODCAST" below a stylized "STUDIO" logo, and another on the right reads "GOSS TALK JOY" with "PODCAST" written in smaller letters below. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a fixed position, speaking with slight movements of his head and mouth, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
